added: Vector provider audit now compares against full provider:model:dimension index identity
New p1-vector-index-repair command rebuilds vectors after provider/model/dimension drift
Repair command blocks structural corruption instead of hiding orphan-vector issues
current_sprint.name: P1 Vector Index Repair Command

next_release: Sprint 3 continuation: full collect/test, live VPS pgvector migration/audit, then connector runtime foundation
notes: v30.17: vectors are keyed by provider:model:dimension, preventing silent model-migration drift under the same provider label.
v30.16: OpenAI embeddings no longer require the optional SDK; provider falls back to native HTTPS API, not local fake vectors.
v30.15: production provider health now blocks vector dimension mismatch before ingest/reindex can corrupt index assumptions.
v30.14: embedding configuration contract added; production blocks local/fallback/missing provider prerequisites before semantic gate.
open_blockers: live OpenAI/Ollama provider health against real credentials/endpoints
production semantic embedding provider live credentials/endpoints
recent_changes: v30.17: Added embedding index identity guard and tests for provider/model/dimension scoped vector storage/search.
v30.16: Added native OpenAI HTTPS embedding transport, timeout config, transport diagnostics, and no-fallback error tests.
v30.15: Added OpenAI/Ollama dimension contract enforcement and provider default dimensions.
v30.14: Added embedding configuration contract and production prerequisite checks.
v30.13: Added Golden Retrieval quality gate with recall/MRR/nDCG/passrate.
v30.12: Added provider health gate and restored config/golden_retrieval.json path.
v30.10: P1 parser ingest emits structured parse events and directory ingest diagnostics.
release_blockers: full pytest -q completion pending outside sandbox timeout
real live PostgreSQL/pgvector validation pending on user VPS
SQLite to PostgreSQL migration live apply pending against VPS
release_notes: v30.12: P1 production gate now blocks non-production embedding providers explicitly and exposes p1-provider-health diagnostics.
v30.11: P1 vector provider guard now blocks same-provider embedding dimension drift and requires reindex.
v30.18: Vector audit uses full index identity and p1-vector-index-repair deterministically fixes provider/model/dimension drift through reindex.
